channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping - bike lockers, 6th May
item.description:
Two flytipping incidents at (1) side of Fareshares and (2) by bike lockers next to Oyster Court. Bags and a bed dumped. Please clear
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 85, Crampton Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Request for Inspection and Pruning of Council Tree Overhanging Driveway, 6th May
item.description:
Dear Tree Management Team, I am writing to report a council-owned tree located on the pavement outside my property which has become significantly overgrown and is now leaning and overhanging my driveway. The tree is regularly depositing large amounts of sticky sap onto vehicles parked on the driveway. This is creating an ongoing nuisance and, if not removed promptly and properly, can damage vehicle paintwork and finishes, potentially leading to costly cleaning and repair work. The overhang has now become excessive and is directly affecting the reasonable use and enjoyment of my property. Given the continued encroachment and the potential for property damage, I would ask that the council arrange for the tree to be inspected by a Tree Officer and appropriately pruned back from the driveway area. I have attached photographs showing: The extent of the overhang the position of the tree in relation to the driveway sap deposits affecting vehicles As the issue is ongoing, I would appreciate confirmation that this report has been logged and details of any proposed inspection or maintenance timescale. Kind regards, Jasmin A

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Norfolk Crescent, Falconwood, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessively bright lights, 6th May
item.description:
Excessive lighting with no cover to prevent light from spilling in to adjacent residential flats. Lights are left on through the night for no reason and are excessively bright to the point of light bleeding past black out blinds and curtains.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lynmouth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By the bicycle hangar, 6th May
item.description:
Box with canisters of nitrous oxide left on the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Buckley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Shelving or furniture dumped by pavement, 5th May
item.description:
Somebody has dumped an old shelving unit by the tree on the pavement. Other people have now started dropping litter next to it. Please kindly remove asap.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bevington Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Domestic Bin Dumped on Pavement, 5th May
item.description:
An unwanted domestic bin has been left dumped on the pavement (between two wheelie-bins) outside number 119. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Access Panel from Lamppost Removed Exposing Electrical Components, 5th May
item.description:
